query: AI runs your email marketing. Better with every send. complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: AI in Email Marketing: The Real Use Cases, Not the Hype
results.content:
## How Does AI Improve Email Deliverability?

AI monitors sending patterns, reputation signals, and inbox placement in real time, catching deliverability problems before they damage your domain.

Email deliverability has become the foundational challenge of email marketing. Google and Yahoo's 2024 sender requirements set a hard ceiling: more than 0.1% spam complaints and your domain reputation takes a hit. That is 1 complaint per 1,000 emails.

AI helps in several specific ways: [...] Send-time optimization: AI analyzes recipient behavior patterns and sends emails when individual prospects are most likely to open them. This is not a gimmick. According to industry benchmarks, send-time optimized campaigns see 15–20% higher open rates versus batch-and-blast sending.
 Reputation monitoring: AI tracks your sender score, bounce rates, and spam complaint rates in real time. When metrics start trending in the wrong direction, the system alerts you or automatically throttles sending before damage compounds.
 Warmup automation: New domains and mailboxes need a gradual volume ramp-up to build a reputation. Unlimited email warmup through AI automates this process, generating realistic engagement patterns that signal legitimacy to inbox providers. [...] Autonomous AI cannot assess brand risk: An AI that sends 5,000 emails per week without human review will inevitably say something that misrepresents your product, makes an inaccurate claim about a prospect's company, or strikes the wrong tone for a sensitive industry.
 Buyers are getting better at detection: That 69% stat from Hunter.io is climbing year over year. The more AI-generated outreach floods inboxes, the more sophisticated buyers become at filtering it out.
 Autonomous tools burn your prospect list: When AI sends a bad email to a VP of Sales at your dream account, you do not get a second chance. A human would have caught the issue. An autonomous system sends it anyway.

results.title: AI Cold Email Is Killing Cold Email (And Everyone’s Pretending It’s Fine)
results.content:
The successful 5% already figured this out.

They’re using AI as a research assistant, not an autonomous writer. They’re sending hundreds of quality emails, not hundreds of thousands of template blasts. They’re building sustainable practices that improve over time rather than burning lists and domains.

The question is whether the other 95% will learn from the data or keep buying tools that promise unlimited scale while delivering unlimited spam complaints.

I know which way I’d bet. But then again, I’ve been watching people ignore obvious truths about email marketing for three decades.

Some things never change. 🤷♂️

This article was first published on my personal blog here.

Marketing Done Right

### Marketing Done Right

#### 2,684 followers [...] Every email marketing platform generates a hosted web version of your campaign. It lives at a public URL, it loads in…

### How to Use Claude Properly: Projects, Code, Design, Cowork, and the Rest of the Ecosystem

Everyone is talking about Claude right now. 🤷♂️ Fair enough… Claude Design hit a million users in its first week…

### AI Costs Are Rising Because You Were Never Paying the Real Price

Everyone is complaining about AI costs. Subscription limits, API bills, token overruns.

### Congratulations on your degree. AI got the same one last Tuesday. 😅

This came up at RELACTION (the marketing master’s event at Politécnico de Leiria) when I was on a panel about AI and…

### The Underrated Side of AI Automation That Most Businesses Are Getting Wrong [...] ## The Legal Catastrophe That Might Creep Up

If you’re in Europe or targeting Europeans, AI cold email automation creates legal exposure that should terrify you.

GDPR fines have reached €5.65 billion across 2,245 cases by March 2025. The top complaint? “I don’t know how you got my email.”

Most tools use scraped or purchased data. “I bought the list” is not a GDPR defence. “Legitimate interest” requires individualised assessment, incompatible with sending 10,000 identical emails daily based on job title alone.

results.title: How AI Marketing Tools Are Changing the Game
results.content:
Impact on Marketing: ML enables marketers to create highly personalized marketing campaigns that resonate with individual customers. AI email marketing tools help optimize marketing efforts by identifying the most promising leads and tailoring messaging to specific audience segments. ML models continuously learn and adapt, allowing businesses to refine their strategies over time for better performance and ROI. [...] ### 7. Email Marketing

 Personalized Campaigns: AI analyzes recipient behavior and preferences to send highly personalized emails that improve open rates and engagement. Platforms like Mailchimp use AI to tailor email content and offers to individual recipients, enhancing engagement.
 Send Time Optimization: AI predicts the best times to send emails to individual recipients for higher open and click-through rates. By analyzing user behavior patterns, AI tools can optimize the timing of email sends to maximize engagement and response rates.
 Subject Line Optimization: AI can analyze previous email campaigns to determine which subject lines perform best, helping marketers craft more compelling subject lines that increase open rates.

### Sell Effortlessly With Ringy [...] 3

### Increased Efficiency

By automating repetitive marketing tasks, AI platforms significantly enhance efficiency. Tasks such as email marketing, social media posting, and lead nurturing can be automated, freeing up marketers to focus on strategic activities. Automation also reduces the likelihood of errors and ensures that marketing activities are carried out consistently and on schedule.  
  
Example: Ringy

Source

Ringy’s AI-powered marketing automation platform helps businesses automate repetitive tasks such as email marketing, SMS marketing, drip campaigns, and lead nurturing. This automation allows marketing teams to focus on more strategic activities, improving overall efficiency and productivity.
